prompt: Create a meme about choosing between Netflix shows using 'distracted boyfriend' meme template.
prompt_refined: Generate an image based on image 1, creating a 'distracted boyfriend' meme about choosing between Netflix shows. Insert the text 'Me' into the white text box on the man's back in the center of the image. Insert the text 'My Unfinished Series' into the white text box located in the top-right portion of the image, above the man and near the woman in blue.
